texto: You're well enough looked after now' says Farouq. 'We are your friends. Don't we care about you? All this bitterness, it's in your own mind. To be accepted as a human being, you must behave like one. The more human you act, the more human you'll be.' He spoils the effect of this decent speech by adding with a smirk, 'Four-foot cunt.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Indra Sinha: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “You're well enough looked after now' says Farouq. 'We are your friends. Don't we care about you? …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, friends, human pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.

To be accepted as a human being, you must behave like one. The more human you act, the more human you'll be.' He spoils the effect of this decent speech by adding with a smirk, 'Four-foot cunt.

texto: At the end of time when God judges us humans, I just hope He remembers to judge Himself as well.
explicacao: Citação de Indra Sinha sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “At the end of time when God judges us humans, I just hope He remembers to judge Himself as well.” articula fe, god, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como termino e religion.
